---
output: github_document
---



```{r, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-"
)
```


# writR <img src="man/figures/logo.svg" align="right" width="120" />

Toolbox to Support Academic Writing



## Overview




## Installation

Before you can install *bibliogR* itself, you will also need to install from CRAN the following R packages:  

```{r, eval = FALSE}
install.packages(
  "bslib", "meme", "rstudioapi", "writR", "shiny", "DT", "dplyr",
  "tokenizers", "tidyr", "purrr", "rmarkdown", "tibble", "stringr", "knitr"
)
```


```{r, eval = FALSE}
devtools::install.github("NicolasJBM/writR")
```


## Usage




## Toolboxes
